questionHtml:
Three possible features of an atomic model are

I. orbital radius

II. quantized energy

III. quantized angular momentum.

Which of these are features of the Bohr model for hydrogen?

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II, and III

meta.title: Three possible features of an atomic model are I. orbital radius II. quantized energy III. quantized angular momentum. Which of these are features of the Bohr model for hydrogen? A
